description:
Free and open source advanced weather radar viewer.

Supercell Wx is a free, open source application to visualize live and archive NEXRAD Level 2 and Level 3 data, and severe weather alerts. It displays continuously updating weather data on top of a responsive map, providing the capability to monitor weather events using reflectivity, velocity, and other products.
What's Changed
- Archive Warnings by @dpaulat in #425
- Level 2 chunks by @AdenKoperczak in #404
- Pinch to zoom by @dpaulat in #441
- Radar site line and radar distance and altitude tootlip by @AdenKoperczak in #436
- Add a Flatpak Builld by @AdenKoperczak in #460
- Add macOS support by @dpaulat in #469
Various Fixes
- Add a maximum number of forward/backward time steps that can be queued by @AdenKoperczak in #419
- Share GL resources between maps by @dpaulat in #440
- Fix GlContext destruction of OpenGLFunctions causing crash by @dpaulat in #444
- Add wayland plugin by @AdenKoperczak in #445
- Update to RDA/RPG Build 23.0 by @dpaulat in #446
- Make sure shared uniforms are updated correctly per-map pane by @dpaulat in #447
- Move media objects to dedicated thread to avoid main thread delays by @dpaulat in #448
- EET does not use default scale and offset by @dpaulat in #449
- Add build number and increase log file write frequency by @dpaulat in #450
- Add support statement for NixOS 25.05+ to README by @aware70 in #453
- Fix level 2 settings big buttons by @AdenKoperczak in #452
- Remove scrolling editing settings by @AdenKoperczak in #451
- CMake Setup, CMakePresets and Python Virtual Environments by @dpaulat in #457
- Update color table immediately on palette change by @dpaulat in #462
- Add hotkeys for switching between products in a category by @AdenKoperczak in #465
- Make animation dock follow default timezones by @AdenKoperczak in #466
- macOS Cleanup by @dpaulat in #471
Full Changelog: v0.4.9-release...v0.5.0-release
